evidence_quotes.quote: The initiative wants to ensure the ability of consumers to still keep or operate the product they have spend money on even after the developer/publisher decides the end of support.

paragraphs.text: Dear Sir/Madam, I would like to give some feed back on the fact that i support in principle the act but also that i believe that this act's intentions are also aligned with the consumer protection goals of the Stop Destroying Videogames initiative. The initiative wants to ensure the ability of consumers to still keep or operate the product they have spend money on even after the developer/publisher decides the end of support. It seeks for developers to have an end of support plan that would allow that without the need for further effort from the developer after the end of support. The digital fairness act could be extended to include the goals (at least partly) of the initiative.
